title: senecio doria subsp. biebersteinii
intro: Senecio doria subsp. biebersteinii, also known as Lesser Ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio doria subsp. biebersteinii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of allergies. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
